params.name: Plasma Stealth
params.description:
On Mar 15, 1999 AD, Russian scientists first put plasma stealth technology into practical use.
Plasma is the fourth state of matter formed after the ionization of gas, consisting of positively charged ions, free electrons, and neutral atoms, and overall electrically neutral. The stealth effect of plasma is achieved through collisions with electromagnetic waves. The higher the electron density inside the plasma, the higher the oscillation frequency, and the greater the absorption of radar wave …
